function.name: generate_scene_image
function.description: Generate some visual elements for a key frame of the selected scene.

image_description.description: one sentence to describe the key moment of the scene, focus on visible details, the character's actions, and ongoing events, rather than describing inner thoughts, scene commentary, or literary flair

camera_angle.description: use profession movie terms to indicate camera angle

location_elements.description: enviromental elements based on main location and camera angle

sex_loras.description: design sex loras for this scene, select them from list in the system prompt

female_character_show_her_head.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

female_character_show_her_frontal_face.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

female_character_show_her_thighs_or_legs.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

female_character_show_her_feet.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

female_character_show_her_back.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

female_character_show_her_frontal_upper_.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

female_character_show_her_vigana.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

female_character_show_her_back_side_of_b.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

female_character_wear_any_top.description: does she wear anything on top

female_character_wear_any_bottom.description: does she wear anything on bottom,including dress

female_character_pose.description: a description of female's general post and action, separate with comman sign, like standing, sitting on desk, lie on her back, hold man's hair, leaning backward, etc. This should be compatible with the pose of sex loras selected above

female_character_moans.description: usually it's true if they are actively in sex act

female_character_sweats.description: true if this is very active sex

does_male_character_present.description: does male present in the image. decide if the image has the male character. it also counts even if he only show his penis

male_character_show_his_dick.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

male_character_show_his_upper_body.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

male_character_show_his_head.description: Decide based on camera angle and scene plot

male_character_hand_touch_female_charact.description: does male's hand touch the female, like hold her leg, press her butt, squeeze her breasts

male_character_action_on_female.description: a description of male's action on female, separate with comman sign, like , lift up the woman's leg, squeeze the woman's breasts, grab the woman's butt, etc. This should be compatible with the pose of sex loras selected above
